title: Alberta COVID-19 Phase 2 Update
excerpt: Great news from the province yesterday as gyms and fitness facilities have been moved into phase 2 of COVID-19 re-opening starting as soon as Friday June 12th. With AHS removing some restrictions and allowing squash to reopen is huge and very welcoming. Please stay tuned as we are confirming our reopening guidelines so we can … Read more
content:
Great news from the province yesterday as gyms and fitness facilities have been moved into phase 2 of COVID-19 re-opening starting as soon as Friday June 12th. With AHS removing some restrictions and allowing squash to reopen is huge and very welcoming. Please stay tuned as we are confirming our reopening guidelines so we can create a safe environment for our members when we resume play. Please do not book courts until we advise when to do so.

John
